_comment: RepoFabric peer-caching compliance policy. Flags endpoints where BranchCache, BITS Peercaching, or DO has drifted from the desired state. Implemented as a Custom Compliance Policy in Intune (Devices -> Compliance -> Create policy -> Windows 10+ -> Custom). The discovery script runs locally on each endpoint and returns a JSON object that Intune compares against the rules below. See deploy/intune/README.md for the import walkthrough. Operated by RingoSystems Heavy Industries.

discoveryScript.description: Runs on the endpoint, returns a JSON object whose keys are referenced in the 'rules' array below.
discoveryScript.body:
$result = @{}
# BranchCache service state
try { $svc = Get-Service -Name PeerDistSvc -ErrorAction Stop; $result.BranchCacheRunning = $svc.Status -eq 'Running' } catch { $result.BranchCacheRunning = $false }
# BranchCache mode (1 = Distributed, 2 = Hosted)
try { $result.BranchCacheMode = (Get-BCStatus -ErrorAction Stop).BranchCacheStatus.BranchCacheServiceStatus } catch { $result.BranchCacheMode = 'unknown' }
# BITS Peercaching enabled (registry; HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\BITS\EnablePeerCaching)
$bits = Get-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\BITS' -Name EnablePeerCaching -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$result.BitsPeercachingEnabled = ($bits.EnablePeerCaching -eq 1)
# Delivery Optimization Download Mode (must be 1, 2, or 3 to peer)
try { $result.DODownloadMode = (Get-DeliveryOptimizationStatus -ErrorAction Stop).DownloadMode } catch { $result.DODownloadMode = -1 }
# Firewall rule groups enabled
$bcHttp = Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'BranchCache - Content Retrieval (Uses HTTP)' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Enabled -eq 'True'
$bcWsd  = Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'BranchCache - Peer Discovery (Uses WSD)'      -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Enabled -eq 'True'
$result.FirewallHttpEnabled = [bool]$bcHttp
$result.FirewallWsdEnabled  = [bool]$bcWsd
($result | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)

remediationStrings.title: BranchCache service is not running
remediationStrings.description: The PeerDistSvc service is required for peer-to-peer installer caching. Reboot or contact IT.

remediationStrings.title: BITS Peercaching is not enabled
remediationStrings.description: Without BITS Peercaching, this endpoint will not share installer blocks with peers and will not benefit from peer-cached installs. Ensure the 'RepoFabric - Peer caching' Intune profile has applied.

remediationStrings.title: Delivery Optimization is disabled
remediationStrings.description: DO Download Mode must be 1 or higher for peer-share to function. Ensure the 'RepoFabric - Peer caching' Intune profile has applied.

remediationStrings.title: BranchCache HTTP firewall rule is disabled
remediationStrings.description: Inbound TCP 80 from the local subnet must be allowed for peer-share to function. Ensure the Endpoint Security Firewall profile activates 'BranchCache - Content Retrieval (Uses HTTP)'.

remediationStrings.title: BranchCache peer discovery firewall rule is disabled
remediationStrings.description: Inbound UDP 3702 (WS-Discovery) from the local subnet must be allowed for peer-share to function. Ensure the Endpoint Security Firewall profile activates 'BranchCache - Peer Discovery (Uses WSD)'.
